title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates:
Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates!
